name: HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR tool
description: For HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR processing 10–20 time-off requests/week, inefficient approval workflows cause delays in employee scheduling. We automate the summarization and emailing of requests instead of manual tracking and email communication for approvals.
target_audience: HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR
problem_solved: Inefficient approval workflows for employee time-off requests
